features.name: techmap_celltype_attribute_with_mul
features.description: Code should include a techmap rule using the techmap_celltype attribute to match on $mul cell type

features.name: sv_logic_type_in_multiplication
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog module using logic type for single-bit signals in a multiplication operation

features.name: techmap_replace_with_width_mismatch
features.description: Code should include a techmap rule using _TECHMAP_REPLACE_ where replacement module expects different bit width than original cell

features.name: techmap_assert_mode_failure
features.description: Code should include a techmap command with -assert flag that fails when cell mapping cannot be completed
